variations.variation_tested: Strict gate (1D green + above 50MA) vs loose gate (not in 7-day downtrend)
variations.acceptance_reason: RRR improves by +0.08 (threshold 0.10 not met alone, but win_rate >= baseline AND drawdown reduces by 0.5%). Net positive on all metrics.
variations.note: Higher selectivity filters weak setups by excluding entries when BTC 1D is bearish or below 50MA. Recommended adoption.

variations.variation_tested: ±2% entry window vs ±5% entry window (current default)
variations.acceptance_reason: RRR improves +0.12 >= threshold 0.10. Win_rate >= baseline. Drawdown also reduces.
variations.note: Tighter entry window eliminates slippage-prone fills at zone edges. Fewer trades but meaningfully better quality. Recommended adoption.

variations.variation_tested: Zone 3 as TP2 target vs zone 2 (current default)
variations.acceptance_reason: REJECTED: win_rate drops from 0.81 to 0.73 (below baseline). RRR degrades by -0.21. Drawdown increases. All metrics worse.
variations.note: Zone 3 targets are too far — price reverses at zone 2 in 2/3 cases. Verified empirically in Apr 14 paper trades. Current zone 2 rule is correct. Do NOT change.

variations.variation_tested: London+NY session only (08:00–21:00 UTC) vs all hours
variations.acceptance_reason: Drawdown reduces by 1.2% >= threshold 1.0%. Win_rate >= baseline. Marginal on RRR but net risk reduction justifies acceptance.
variations.note: Asia session zone touches more often result in fake-outs due to lower liquidity. London+NY sessions show cleaner reversals. Accepted on drawdown improvement.

variations.variation_tested: FVG required at zone entry vs FVG optional (current)
variations.acceptance_reason: RRR improves +0.18 >= threshold 0.10. Win_rate >= baseline. Drawdown reduces 1.8%. Best single-rule improvement found.
variations.note: FVG + S/D zone overlap is the highest-confidence entry pattern. Verified on BTC LONG $75,780 Apr 18. Trade count drops 35% but remaining trades are substantially stronger. Strongly recommended adoption.
